title: Add nix fmt formatter output (nixfmt-rfc-style)
description: No formatter output in flake.nix; no treefmt/nixfmt config. 80+ .nix files, multiple committers (colleague servers, agents). Add formatter = genAttrs systems (system: legacyPackages.${system}.nixfmt-rfc-style); so 'nix fmt' works and can be CI-gated.
close_reason: Added formatter output (scoped nixfmt wrapper); nix fmt formats repo's own Nix, skips vendored/dead files

title: Refactor ~25 copy-pasted darwinConfigurations into a data-driven host table
description: darwinConfigurations.{fu129,fu146,j8,...} are byte-identical except name. Drive common cases from a list via genAttrs; keep hand-written blocks only for special hosts (raphael/pstate/server/hmConfig).
close_reason: Refactored 13 identical darwin hosts -> genAttrs+mkDarwin, 6 colleague servers -> mkServer. Proven byte-identical drvs vs explicit defs (same-tree _ctrl comparison); all 33 host attr-names preserved.

title: Add devShell with contributor toolchain + .envrc use flake
description: No devShells output; .envrc only exports PATH (no 'use flake'). DS article's #1 adoption tip is dev shells. Add devShells.${system}.default = mkShell { packages = [ nixfmt-rfc-style statix deadnix sops ssh-to-age age ]; } and change .envrc to 'use flake'.

title: Consider allowUnfreePredicate instead of global allowUnfree = true
description: mksystem.nix:56 sets allowUnfree=true for every system (blanket). Optionally switch to allowUnfreePredicate listing actually-used unfree packages so new unfree deps are a conscious choice. Lower priority; risk of breaking builds if list incomplete.

title: Cleanup stale/duplicate files (vm-aarch64-prl hardware, githubrunner vs github-runner, omarchy/j9 dup)
description: 1) hosts/hardware/vm-aarch64-prl.nix orphaned (config removed per flake.nix comment). 2) users/githubrunner vs users/github-runner near-homonym footgun. 3) homeConfigurations omarchy and j9 ~90% duplicate. Delete orphan, rename one runner dir, factor shared HM module.

title: Document or hoist double nixpkgs-unstable instantiation in overlays
description: lib/overlays.nix imports nixpkgs-unstable inside the overlay -> second full pkgs eval per system; unstable pkgs don't inherit rest of nixpkgs config. Add explanatory comment or hoist to instantiate once.
close_reason: Added explanatory comment documenting the intentional second nixpkgs-unstable instantiation in lib/overlays.nix

title: Split lib/overlays.nix (1474-line hand-pinned binary monolith) into per-tool files
description: lib/overlays.nix is 1474 lines of per-tool blocks each with 4 hard-coded platform sha256 hashes. Biggest maintenance hotspot. Split into overlays/<tool>.nix imported by a small aggregator; prefer fetchFromGitHub+build* over raw fetchurl where releases allow. Large background refactor.

title: Add flake checks output (format check, optional statix/deadnix)
description: flake exposes only the config attrsets; nix flake check does no lint/format/smoke-build. Add checks.${system}.format running nixfmt --check, optionally statix/deadnix. Depends on formatter (P1.2).
close_reason: Added checks.format gate; builds green; proves all 110 in-scope files parse

title: Add admin recovery age key to .sops.yaml (secrets encrypted to host keys only)
description: Every creation_rule encrypts only to the host's age key; &admin_joost is commented out. If a host is lost you cannot decrypt/rotate its secrets from your workstation. Add personal age key as &admin_joost to every key_group and run sops updatekeys. REQUIRES user's age key (cannot be done by agent).

title: Remove dead nix.yml CI workflow (triggers on master, runs on retired ubuntu-20.04)
description: nix.yml triggers on push to 'master' but default branch is 'main', so it never runs on push. Uses retired ubuntu-20.04 and cachix/install-nix-action@v31 with an unfilled binary-cache TODO. Redundant with fh.yml (DeterminateSystems/ci) which already runs flake check + builds with FlakeHub caching. Action: delete .github/workflows/nix.yml.
close_reason: Deleted .github/workflows/nix.yml (dead: triggered on master, never ran on main; redundant with fh.yml)
